Issues by Rule

Severity:
Tool:
WCAG:

Serious link-in-text-block WCAG 2.0 axe 2 pages, 4 instances

Ensure links are distinguished from surrounding text in a way that does not rely on color Learn more ↗

2 affected pages — expand to see details

https://www.nih.gov/about-nih/impact-nih-research/improving-health (1 instance)

.usa-identifier__identity-disclaimer > a[href$="hhs.gov/"]
<a href="https://www.hhs.gov/" class="ext" data-extlink="" target="_blank" rel="noopener nofollow noreferrer" title="(opens in a new window)">Department of Health and Human Services</a>

Fix: Fix any of the following: The link has insufficient color contrast of 1.31:1 with the surrounding text. (Minimum contrast is 3:1, link text: #dfe1e2, surrounding text: #ffffff) The link has no styling (such as underline) to distinguish it from the surrounding text

https://www.nih.gov/research-training/safety-regulation-guidance (3 instances)

li:nth-child(12) > a[data-extlink=""][target="_blank"][rel="noopener nofollow noreferrer"]
<a href="http://drs.ors.od.nih.gov/Pages/default.aspx" class="ext" data-extlink="" target="_blank" rel="noopener nofollow noreferrer" title="(opens in a new window)">Radiation Safety</a>

Fix: Fix any of the following: The link has insufficient color contrast of 2.01:1 with the surrounding text. (Minimum contrast is 3:1, link text: #005ea2, surrounding text: #2e2e2e) The link has no styling (such as underline) to distinguish it from the surrounding text

li:nth-child(14) > a[data-extlink=""][target="_blank"][rel="noopener nofollow noreferrer"]
<a href="https://www.orf.od.nih.gov/EnvironmentalProtection/WasteDisposal/Pages/default.aspx" class="ext" data-extlink="" target="_blank" rel="noopener nofollow noreferrer" title="(opens in a new window)">Waste Management</a>

Fix: Fix any of the following: The link has insufficient color contrast of 2.01:1 with the surrounding text. (Minimum contrast is 3:1, link text: #005ea2, surrounding text: #2e2e2e) The link has no styling (such as underline) to distinguish it from the surrounding text

.usa-identifier__identity-disclaimer > a[href$="hhs.gov/"]
<a href="https://www.hhs.gov/" class="ext" data-extlink="" target="_blank" rel="noopener nofollow noreferrer" title="(opens in a new window)">Department of Health and Human Services</a>

Fix: Fix any of the following: The link has insufficient color contrast of 1.31:1 with the surrounding text. (Minimum contrast is 3:1, link text: #dfe1e2, surrounding text: #ffffff) The link has no styling (such as underline) to distinguish it from the surrounding text

Project: github.com/mgifford/vital-core

VITAL-Core is an independent open source project. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the websites and agencies scanned by this dashboard.
